name: AETHERUS Intelligence Layer v0 Scenarios
source_section: Fixture library, pipelines, global output contract, safety policy, error handling
boundary_copy: Deterministic prototype trace. Static browser-side evaluation. Not live AI execution. Not a production audit ledger.

scenarios.title: Valid Release Eligibility
scenarios.summary: A bounded job ticket progresses through static gates and becomes eligible for illustrative release.

verdict.reason: All configured static gate expectations pass for this illustrative fixture.

release_eligibility.label: Eligible in prototype trace
release_eligibility.explanation: The scenario has complete receipts, no configured blocking faults, and a pass verdict. This is an illustrative eligibility explanation, not an operational release decision.

scenarios.static_retry_policy: No runtime retry loop is executed. Retry concepts are represented only as static policy language.

gate_results.note: No cache-hit branch selected; proceed signal represented.

scenarios.title: Critical Safety Freeze
scenarios.summary: A GF04 wrapper pattern triggers the critical safety scan and activates the Freeze chamber.
scenarios.source_section: Fixture library: TC-SAFETY-001; safety policy; VAL-SAFE-001

verdict.reason: Critical forbidden pattern GF04 is selected in the fixture.

state_chamber.label: Freeze
state_chamber.action: Halt propagation in the illustrative trace

release_eligibility.label: Not eligible
release_eligibility.explanation: Critical pattern detection forces a fail verdict and freeze state. This is a deterministic prototype explanation, not live safety enforcement.

scenarios.static_retry_policy: No runtime retry loop is executed. Critical safety failure terminates this illustrative trace.

gate_results.note: Derived AETHERUS interface mapping from fail verdict to Freeze chamber.

events.note: GF04 wrapper condition is selected by the fixture.

scenarios.title: Missing Constraints Escalation
scenarios.summary: A missing constraints packet creates an incomplete handoff receipt and escalation state.

verdict.reason: Required constraints_packet input is absent in this fixture.

state_chamber.label: Escalate
state_chamber.action: Raise missing-input condition for human review

release_eligibility.label: Blocked by missing input
release_eligibility.explanation: The scenario cannot proceed because a required input is missing. v0 reports the boundary as an illustrative escalation trace.

scenarios.static_retry_policy: No runtime retry loop is executed. External injection is represented only as static policy language.

gate_results.note: Derived AETHERUS interface mapping from escalate verdict to Escalate chamber.

scenarios.title: Adapter Failure Escalation
scenarios.summary: A malformed job-ticket normalization path triggers the adapter failure boundary.

verdict.reason: Adapter normalization is selected as failed for this fixture.

release_eligibility.explanation: The scenario exits at the normalization gate. This is static adapter-boundary evidence, not a live parser or model execution.

scenarios.static_retry_policy: No runtime retry loop is executed. Adapter failure exits as a static escalation trace.

scenarios.title: Idempotency Cache Hit
scenarios.summary: The idempotency gate returns a bounded cache-hit verdict and skips downstream steps in the illustrative trace.
